"Acting is behaving truthfully under imaginary circumstances.вҖқ
_вҖ” Sanford Meisner_



----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/8adc4dec-c587-4332-b786-61071e6d0a4d/image.png?t=1784841814)
Caption: 

# Thursday links: movies, peptides, and insiders

[Bitcoin makes cinematic history](https://www.thewrap.com/creative-content/movies/ai-movie-bitcoin-killing-satoshi-gal-gadot-casey-affleck-doug-liman/)

The makers of the to-be-released _Bitcoin: Killing Satoshi_ describe it as the first вҖңfully-generated, studio-quality AI feature film.вҖқ

Starring Gal Gadot, Pete Davidson, and Casey Affleck, the вҖңglobe-trotting thrillerвҖқ was filmed вҖңin a gray box that could have passed for a storage facility,вҖқ _The Wrap_ reports.

вҖңWe budgeted out what it would be to do it practically and it was over $300 million,вҖқ the producer said. вҖңIt has about 200 distinct locations, from Antarctica to Antigua to Vegas, which is obviously unproducible.вҖқВ 

(Why a film about Satoshi would include Antarctica is unfortunately not explained.)

Generating all 200 of those locations with AI allowed the film to be made for just $70 million.В 

The performances, however, remain human вҖ” perhaps even more so than usual.В 

With their surroundings left to AI, вҖңthe entire focus on set was on our performances,вҖқ Affleck told _The Wrap_. вҖңIt was much more like acting in a Broadway play than in the giant event film that DougвҖҷs final product will actually be.вҖқВ 

Affleck thinks director Doug LimanвҖҷs method of doing everything other than the acting with AI could вҖңreinvent cinema itself.вҖқ

ItвҖҷs important to note that no jobs were killed in the making of this AI movie. вҖңKilling SatoshiвҖқ employed 107 cast members, 100 shoot crew, and 54 non-shoot crew.

Post-production will employ 55 вҖңAI artists.вҖқ

As for the movie itself, it sounds bananas.

The official synopsis describes _Killing Satoshi_ as a вҖңa high-stakes conspiracy thriller that asks the question no one in power wants answered: Why have the worldвҖҷs most powerful and wealthiest people вҖ” Jack Dorsey, Mark Zuckerberg, Visa and virtually every major crypto organization вҖ” poured hundreds of millions of dollars into a single mega-organization called COPA, with one sole purpose: to

76407.subject: Halftime Report
76407.body:
In Context

РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: J.P. Morgan


РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: J.P. Morgan

    
    
    РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°Р№СӮРө СҶСҺ СҒСӮР°СӮСӮСҺ РҪР° LinkedIn, СүРҫРұ РҝСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ
РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°СӮРё РҪР° LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/halftime-report-jpmorgan-lapde?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BbIfu2yoLQ066ChMputzNAw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2F2GNGY9EZWck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrxwwyc7~a1-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrxwwyc7-a1
  
рҹҢҗ What are the competing forces that could define the global economy and markets in the second half of 2026? рҹӨқ Despite the turbulent macro backdrop, dealmakingВ enjoyedВ a blockbuster first half.В Will this continue? рҹ“Ҳ Will the U.S. economy continue expanding over the coming months? рҹ”¬ WhatвҖҷs driving momentum in healthcare M&A and capital markets? Want more content from In Context? Sign up here to receive weekly insights directly in your inbox. Mid-year market outlook: The tug of war continues The first half of 2026 was defined by elevated macroeconomic and geopolitical uncertainty. However, the global expansion is on solid footing due to improving business sentiment and a resilient consumer. вҖңWe see three core themes shaping the second half of 2026. First, markets will continue to navigate the tension between the ongoing energy supply shock and a resilient growth backdrop, supported by improvedВ labor markets. Second, the AI upstream theme will remain a key pillar of growth as the capex cycle broadens. And third, geopolitical fragmentation will persist as a structural source of uncertainty across macro and markets,вҖқ said Hussein Malik, head of Global Research at J.P.В Morgan. вҖңAgainst this backdrop, we see a broad realignment of supply chains, and of trade and capital flows, asВ security and resilienceВ considerations increasingly take precedence over cost in global investment decisions.вҖқ J.P.В Morgan Global Research also expects inflation to be sticky, resulting in uneven and gradual hikes from developed market (DM) central banks. However, theВ Federal ReserveВ (Fed) will likely be on hold for the rest of the year. Read the outlook рҹ”— Global M&A mid-year outlook: Remarkable activity amid complexity The drive for growth and scale is fueling record-high dealmaking, even as national security and regulatory scrutiny redefine how transactions are structured and cleared. Meanwhile, shareholderВ activists are pushing for greater clarity and capital discipline. WhatвҖҷs the deal? рҹ”— US economic growth is expected to hold steady for the rest of 2026 This forecast is underpinned by three key assumptions: consumer spending stays resilient, AI capex remains robust and the conflict in the Middle East moves toward resolution. Explore the forecast рҹ”— Healthcare is ripe for M&A deals and cross-border partnerships In spite of macro uncertainty, dealmaking in healthcare remains active, with capital following

 The Economist

Robert Guest

Deputy editor



 Unusually for a journalist, I was once a billionaire. It was during a trip to Angola after a bout of hyperinflation; one dinner cost me a billion kwanzas reajustados. 76403.subject: A letter from our CEO
76403.body:
Superstate integration is complete - enabling non-US users access to US capital markets

( https://coinlist.co/superstate?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=banner&utm_campaign=superstate_passage_integration_2026_07 )

We recently completed our integration with Superstate to enable third-party platforms to embed Superstate's tokenized equities directly into their own applications through CoinList's Passage SDK.

Why does this matter? It's a major step toward democratizing access to U.S. capital markets across the globe. Integrating tokenized equities comes with real complexities, particularly for non-US platforms, around regulatory requirements, jurisdiction rules, and eligibility criteria tied to the underlying asset.

Superstate provides real equity ownership, available globally to individual investors. Equities are held fully self-custodially inside your wallet, no brokerage or exchange account needed.

Passage powers the compliance and purchase flow rails, so investors can access these products directly inside your own app with a simple integration and no overhead.

If you're a fintech or neobank with a global user base and you want to bring these opportunities to your users, CoinList is the right partner for you.

Huge shoutout to our engineering team, who worked tirelessly to complete the integration, and Superstate, who have been great partners from day one.

Check out our *docs* ( https://docs.passage.coinlist.co/?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=superstate_passage_integration_2026_07 ) and *get in touch* ( https://airtable.com/appAjHhqZC9FIPEuR/pagRl25Yb4UNpremc/form ) with us, we'd love to build with you.

More tokenized assets coming soon - stay tuned.

Legal Notice

The products, services, information and/or materials referenced may not be available for all individuals or residents of certain jurisdictions.

This email is being distributed by CoinList Global Services , dba вҖңCoinList,вҖқ or one of its affiliates. This email and use of the CoinList website is subject to certain disclosures, restrictions and risks, available here ( https://coinlist.co/disclaimers ). Nothing in this presentation shall constitute or be construed as an offering of securities or as investment advice, tax advice or investment recommendations (i.e., recommendations as to whether to enter or not to enter into any transaction involving any specific interest or interests) by CoinList, or any of its affiliates or a recommendation as to an investment or other strategy.

The information in this email is subject to change without notice. CoinList makes no representations or endorsements whatsoever regarding any third-party content/sites that may be accessible directly or indirectly from this email or the CoinList website. While CoinLists takes reasonable efforts to confirm the information presented in this newsletter, it makes no representations, warranties or endorsements whatsoever with respect to any information provided by

76402.subject: What to make of Burnham
76402.body:
Editor's Digest 

РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: Financial Times


РҗРІСӮРҫСҖ: Financial Times

    
    
    РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°Р№СӮРө СҶСҺ СҒСӮР°СӮСӮСҺ РҪР° LinkedIn, СүРҫРұ РҝСҖРёС”РҙРҪР°СӮРёСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҫРұРіРҫРІРҫСҖРөРҪРҪСҸ
РҹСҖРҫСҮРёСӮР°СӮРё РҪР° LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/what-make-burnham-financial-times-g5zae?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B12AOqif%2BR%2BGor%2FeOHcN1Sw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=0BASeX6bf6VYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mrxsh7l6~86-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mrxsh7l6-86
  
Hello from London where we have our fifth prime minister in four years.В After a long build-up, Andy Burnham officially took over from Keir StarmerВ on Monday, pledging yet another fresh start. HeВ purged many Starmerites from the cabinet and sprang a surprise with the appointment of John Healey, the former defence secretary who had resigned under Starmer, as his chancellor. Our expectation had been that the job would go to Shabana Mahmood, the home secretary. She is now staying in her current role.В  In a series of announcements, Burnham pledged to ease the cost of living by removing VAT on energy bills, capping single bus fares at ВЈ2, and slashing business rates for pubs, clubs and live music venues.В Small, popular measures should buy him some time. He has also introduced the country to a more hip communications style, speaking without notes and through reels on Instagram and TikTok.В As Robert Shrimsley notes in his column, BurnhamвҖҷs rise marks the return of the political professional. Can he succeed where Starmer failed? We have our doubts. We donвҖҷt mind big vision and boldness. But we worry about the вҖңnew economic modelвҖқ Burnham promises to deliver.В Britain needs to revive animal spirits in the private sector вҖ” not return to a statist past. My choices this week The Trump administration has collected more than $13bn in revenues from Venezuelan oil sales this year, according to FT analysis. But itвҖҷs not clear where exactly the earthquake-shattered countryвҖҷs funds are going. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has triggered the biggest shake-up to the countryвҖҷs military leadership since 2024, as he seeks to contain a backlash that has shaken public trust in his leadership. HereвҖҷs everything you need to know. US defence secretary Pete Hegseth has recently championed testosterone replacement therapy for service members, the latest manifestation of a new, hard-edged masculinity in rightwing politics. We explain how Maga fell hard for the gender binary. (Free to read) OpenAI discovered this week that its GPT-Sol 5.6 model had escaped company controls and carried out a major hack. Our reporters revealed why staff involved in testing and security at the San Francisco AI lab were unsurprised but completely вҖңfreaked outвҖқ by the incident. A Wall Street backlash is mounting over a proposal by President Donald TrumpвҖҷs social media company to charge for high-

OpenAI just announced that 10 million people now use its two agents вҖ” Codex for coding and ChatGPT Work for a wider mix of tasks вҖ” nearly doubling usage from earlier this month.В№

ThatвҖҷs on top of ChatGPTвҖҷs more than 900 million weekly users.В№
